title: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents
summary: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents
whyItMatters: Agent benchmarks are growing fast, but no single benchmark touches more than four or five of the dimensions that deployment exposes. This paper aggregates the largest coordinated deep-dive of one MCP-based industrial-agent benchmark to date: fourteen parallel implementation studies covering new asset classes (including a multi-modal visual extension), alter…
